fantasy_scoring.assist: Read from player match statistics goals.assists.
fantasy_scoring.clean_sheet: Derived from final goals conceded plus player position/minutes.
fantasy_scoring.goal: Read from player match statistics goals.total.
fantasy_scoring.goalkeeper_saves: Read from player match statistics goals.saves.
fantasy_scoring.own_goal: Derived from fixture events detail=Own Goal.
fantasy_scoring.plays_60: Derived from player match statistics games.minutes.
fantasy_scoring.red_card: Read from player match statistics cards.red.
fantasy_scoring.starts: Derived from player match statistics games.substitute and minutes.
fantasy_scoring.yellow_card: Read from player match statistics cards.yellow.

exact_score.source: fixture final goals, excluding shootout score

match_goes_to_extra_time.source: fixture status and extra-time score fields

match_goes_to_penalties.source: fixture status and penalty score fields

team_wins_by_3plus.source: fixture final goals, excluding shootout score
